# Strava AI Export

Strava AI Export helps users turn Strava activity data into AI-ready CSV exports.

## Product

- User-facing language: English
- Primary flow: connect Strava, choose an export range, download a CSV ZIP bundle
- Output target: ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini

## Important routes

- `/`: product entry point
- `/api/auth/start`: planned Strava OAuth start route
- `/sitemap.xml`: sitemap
- `/manifest.json`: web app manifest
